payload.answer: Extracted three durable architecture decisions and two open questions. Open questions were preserved as unresolved rather than committed as current decisions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent
Open questions - Should Telegram be added later?
Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: commit_stable_architecture_relationships_only; leave open questions uncommitted as decisions

entity_resolution.reason: The input defines architecture components and open questions but provides no existing entity identifiers or aliases requiring resolution.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection in the Brain architecture.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent in the Brain architecture.
It is an open question whether Telegram should be added later.
It is an open question which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Committed Brain DB as intended source of truth.
Committed Cognee as intended rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as intended strict memory intake agent.
Recorded Telegram and model choice items as open questions, not decisions.
